label: Draw data rotational data
description: Per-direction render parameters: layer offset, position offset, rotation offset, flip, and pivot. Directional containers (dataNorth, dataEast, dataSouth, dataWest) imply their own rotation direction without requiring an explicit rotation child.

rotation.label: Rotation
rotation.description: Cardinal direction this data applies to. Usually absent in directional blocks (dataNorth/dataEast/dataSouth/dataWest) because the container name implies the direction.

pivot.label: Pivot
pivot.description: Rotation pivot point as a Vector2 in local draw space. Accepts forms: (x, y), x,y, or a single uniform value.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: World-space position offset (x, y, z) for this rotational state.

rotationOffset.label: Rotation offset
rotationOffset.description: Additional rotation angle in degrees applied on top of the base rotation.

flip.label: Flip
flip.description: If true, the graphic is horizontally mirrored for this rotational state.

layer.label: Layer
layer.description: Layer depth offset added to the node's base layer for this rotational state.
